comparison_surface_note: Compares official Configuration clientbound show_dialog framed packet id and context-free direct NoticeDialog body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Configuration clientbound show_dialog packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official direct NoticeDialog context-free fixture only; it does not prove dialog UI display behavior, screen flow, registry-backed dialogs, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
